history.content: Completed — proposal execution is finished successfully. ### What was changed - **Modified:** `skills/web-researcher/SKILL.md` - **Created/Deleted files:** none ### Key upgrades made - Expanded **trigger definitions** for better skill routing precision. - Added clearer **boundaries/fit criteria** to prevent misuse. - Enforced minimum research workflow standards: - At least **3 meaningfully different `web_search` queries** (broad, specific, challenge/validation). - Include **timeframe/recency terms** for time-sensitive topics. - Require **`web_fetch` on high-value sources** (not snippet-only research). - Require **cross-source validation** and synthesized findings with **cited URLs**. - Raised output quality requirements: - Minimum **3 distinct sources**. - **Uncertainty labeling** when evidence is weak/conflicting. - **Stale-source risk callout** where relevant. - Added explicit **anti-patterns** to avoid shallow outputs: - Single-query research. - Single-source claims on contested topics. - Snippet-only conclusions. - Confident claims without citations. ### Verification - Reviewed the final edited skill file line-by-line. - No issues found; changes align with the approved proposal scope.
